Indianapolis Painting Done Right.

Protecting homes across Indy, Carmel, and Fishers. Quality painting that lasts, guaranteed.

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Your Trusted Indianapolis House Painter

Painting and Property Services started with a simple goal: to provide Indianapolis homeowners with reliable, high-quality painting services they could depend on. We're not just painters; we're your neighbors, dedicated to enhancing the beauty and value of our community, one brushstroke at a time.

Learn More →

Seamless drywall repairs to restore your walls and ceilings.

Learn More →

Cabinet Painting

Update your kitchen or bathroom with our professional cabinet painting services.

Learn More →

Siding Repair

Protect your home from the elements with our expert siding repair services.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our house painter services.

How long does an interior painting project typically take?

The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project, but we always provide a realistic timeline upfront and stick to it.

Do I need to move all of my furniture?

We can help you move furniture, and we will cover everything to protect it from paint splatters.

What type of paint do you use?

We use premium-quality paints from trusted brands that are specifically formulated for interior use and are low in VOCs.

Reviews From Our House Painter Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Painting and Property Services did an amazing job painting the interior of my Broad Ripple bungalow. They were efficient, professional, and the quality of their work is outstanding. My house looks brand new!"

Sarah M. Interior Painting

"We hired them to paint the exterior of our home in Carmel. The team was punctual and worked hard. There were a couple of minor touch-ups needed, but they addressed them quickly and without any hassle. Overall, a solid job."

John B. Exterior Painting

"Our deck was looking pretty rough after the winter. Painting and Property Services did a fantastic job cleaning, staining, and sealing it. It looks beautiful now, and I'm confident it will last for years to come. Great communication throughout the process."

Emily K. Deck Staining and Sealing
